description: The migration of tech-literate users to the decentralized Mastodon protocol following Elon Musk's acquisition of Twitter in late 2022. This tracks the viability of fediverse alternatives to centralized platforms.

key_events.description: Elon Musk officially closes the Twitter acquisition deal in October 2022.
Mastodon records record sign-ups as users explore alternatives.
Growth stalls as technical barriers and discovery issues plague the Fediverse.
Twitter stability remains higher than predicted, slowing migration momentum.

calibration_notes: Highlights the difference between 'intent to migrate' and 'actual platform switching' due to friction.
